summary: Replaced single-paragraph overlay copy with three concise paragraphs: (1) identifies EAVI as an ephemeral generative art installation, (2) states no data is stored — no cookies, no tracking, nothing saved or collected, (3) explains that visitor context subtly influences and shapes the scene. Added five new tests under 'US-022: Privacy and artwork copy' validating all acceptance criteria. All 27 tests pass, build succeeds.
